title: 殿下の華麗なるたしなみ

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
For today's Japanese cultural workshop, we'll be
learning flower arrangement. Let's get started,
shall we? ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Okay! ♪ I've been looking forward to this forever!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, I decide to join Fine Motion as she
learns about Japanese culture.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: The art of Japanese flower arrangement focuses on granting new life to flowers. To do so, you must approach them with a calm heart and truly converse with them.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
First, select a flower to serve as the centerpiece.
I've prepared several in advance, so pick one
that's to your liking.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm... Oh, I think I'll choose that cherry
blossom. It's a flower with special meaning to me.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
When I was still just considering studying abroad,
I saw a photo of cherry blossoms in full bloom. It
left me quite struck by the beauty of Japan!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I see... Very interesting. Cherry blossoms are
indeed one of many flowers that represents this
country.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
And for your flower arrangement to be truly
spectacular, selecting a flower you have a special
attachment to is a splendid idea.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Now that I've chosen my flower, the next step is...
to converse with it, right?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
How can I draw out your beauty? It was truly love
at first sight when I saw the contrast of your white
petals against the blue sky...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
And it was so moving when I saw you with my own
eyes in Japan! Oh, the amount of times I walked
beneath you to be showered in your falling petals!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, it looks like you're on the way to creating a
wonderful piece. ♪ The variety in height of your
cuttings is perfectly balanced, and there's nothing
wanting in your assortment either.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I continue working on my own piece, I have to
imagine that her movements, charming in their
subtlety, will result in a delicate arrangement.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When I finally lay eyes on her piece, I find that it
is indeed focused and dignified...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But it also invokes a sense of mighty strength, like
that of a sturdy boulder!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
In essence, this is what resides in Fine's heart—her
true form.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, this is a little embarrassing. It's like you can
see right through me!
choice_data_list: This is what's in her heart...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm taken aback by my impression of Fine
Motion's arrangement. Far from being delicate, it
exudes a firm strength. I move closer to get a
better look, when...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Careful!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Snatch!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Are you okay? You're not hurt, are you?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems I tripped over the table leg, but Fine
Motion caught me in her arms right before I fell.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I recover from the shock, I glance around to
get my bearings. But when I look at Fine Motion, I
see something behind her.
choice_data_list:
(It's a cliff! One that stands tall, firm, and
reliable!)

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, my apologies. Even if it was by reflex, I
should not have grabbed you without permission.
Still, I'm glad you're not hurt!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've always seen Fine Motion as being sweet and
innocent, but after seeing her flower
arrangement, she feels tremendously strong and
dependable.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Striding forward without hesitation, an
unshakable center of balance, ample flexibility...
always on guard.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Your body control just now was incredible. Do
you have some kind of experience in martial arts,
Fine?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hm, I did some fencing in the past. But only a
little.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I see! That steadfast posture and unwavering
spirit... I could even see it in the way you
arranged your flowers.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! I'm honored, but I think you're giving me
too much credit. Right, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: ...Um, hello? Trainer? Are you there?
choice_data_list: Your strength took my breath away...

I was just thinking about how much we learned
today.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh my. I really am so sorry! I had no idea I
startled you that much!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I don't think you need to apologize. That
sounds like admiration.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Sooo... basically, you thought I was cool?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, It's not so bad having you think of me that
way!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I was able to catch a glimpse at Fine Motion's
charm today—equal parts loveliness and strength.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: It was certainly a fruitful experience!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hey, would you like to join me again next time?
I'm sure there'll be so much more to learn.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Then, what shall we cover next time? If you'll
both be joining, something easy to do in pairs is
probably best.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I suggest judo!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I'll never forget the day I learned the true essence
of judo—as an art of gaining victory by yielding
to strength! I've always wanted to learn more!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
And if you're with me, we can practice our
techniques and even have a bout! What do you
think?
choice_data_list:
You want to practice techniques... on each
other?!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Ah, I guess you have a point. That might be
beyond the scope of simple study. It may be best
to save that for another time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I was scared there for a second... That aside, Fine
Motion's eyes are shining with curiosity. I'm
deeply impressed by her thirst for knowledge.
